title: Sharpened Textures
description: The textures for the vanilla weapons and the Mythical Metals crossover weapons in the Simple Swords Mod have been updated
body:
This project is a pure resource pack that provides a comprehensive visual overhaul for the item textures of the "Simple Swords" mod for Minecraft: Java Edition.

If you enjoy the "Simple Swords" mod but find its original textures too simplistic or inconsistent with the vanilla art style, this resource pack will significantly enhance your in-game visual experience.

You must have the "Simple Swords" mod installed first for this resource pack to work, as it is only an add-on component that overrides the default textures.
